questionHtml:
The first day of the menstrual cycle is when menstruation begins. What occurs around day 15 of the cycle?


A.  Formation of a corpus luteum

B.  The placenta starts to secrete progesterone

C.  The end of menstruation

D.  Blood progesterone concentration reaches its maximum

meta.title: The first day of the menstrual cycle is when menstruation begins. What occurs around day 15 of the cycle? A. Formation of a corpus luteum B. The placenta starts to secrete progeste
breadcrumbLabels: D3.1.5. Changes during the ovarian and uterine cycles and their hormonal regulation
